M8/#624, JUDGE JOHN J. BIBLE, CSR D. DAVENPORT, CLK HAMILTON 1040: CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. BRIAN RIPLEY, FOR PLAINTIFFS, WHO ARE PRESENT. JEE SOO KIM, FOR DEFENDANTS WHO ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S PER DIEM FEES PD, #2608P102, $180, DEFENDANTS' PER DIEM FEES PD, #2608P103, $180. CASE SETTLED, FOR STIPULATED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO 664./6CCP. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFFS AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $5834.32 PRINCIPAL, $83. FILING FEES, $50. PROCESS SERVER COSTS, FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $5967.32. LEGAL INTEREST @ 10% POST JUDGMENT. DEFENDANTS TO PAY $250. PER MONTH BEGINNING 7-1-98 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. TO BE PAID AT OFFICE OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL W/ 5 DAY GRACE PERIOD. IF DEFTS FTP, ON 5TH DAY PLTF'S COUNSEL WILL CONTACT DEFT'S COUNSEL & DEFENDANTS WILL BE DEEMED IN DEFAULT OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IF DEFENDANTS DEFAULT, PLAINTIFF MAY MOVE FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
